# programs.mcfly

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.mcfly`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.mcfly.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable mcfly. |
| `programs.mcfly.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.mcfly.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fish integration. |
| `programs.mcfly.enableFuzzySearch` | | |
| `programs.mcfly.enableLightTheme` | `boolean` | Whether to enable light mode theme. |
| `programs.mcfly.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.mcfly.fuzzySearchFactor` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Whether to enable fuzzy searching. 0 is off; higher numbers weight toward shorter matches. Values in the 2-5 range get good results so far. |
| `programs.mcfly.fzf.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable McFly fzf integration. |
| `programs.mcfly.interfaceView` | `one of “TOP”, “BOTTOM”` | Interface view to use. |
| `programs.mcfly.keyScheme` | `one of “emacs”, “vim”` | Key scheme to use. |
| `programs.mcfly.mcflyFzfPackage` | `package` | The mcfly-fzf package to use. |
| `programs.mcfly.package` | `package` | The mcfly package to use. |
| `programs.mcfly.settings` | `TOML value` | Settings written to ~/.config/mcfly/config.toml . |
